title.en: Ye Tian traded a lot of treasures and finally o...

content.en:
Ye Tian originally thought that with his net worth, he should be able to exchange a lot of divine coins, but he was soon disappointed.

Because some low-level resources were of no use to those Divine Generals and Heavenly Monarchs at all, they naturally didn't need those resources, and they wouldn't trade Divine Coins with Ye Tian.

However, the Xeon Treasure and the Chaos Spirit Treasure are also circulating goods in the chaos and can also be traded.

So, Ye Tian took out a lot of Supreme Treasures and some Chaos Spirit Treasures to trade for Divine Coins.

However, the price of the Xeon Arcana is very cheap, a Xeon Arcana is worth up to 10 Divine Coins, the Chaos Spirit Treasure is around 15 Divine Coins, and the top Xeon Arcana is not worth 100 Divine Coins.

Ye Tian traded a lot of treasures and finally obtained 982 divine coins.

This amount of divine coins is not much for the god generals, but it is not too little.

Many god generals do have a few Dao coins on their net worth, which is equivalent to tens of thousands of god coins, but most of them are the value of the treasures on their bodies, and there are not many real god coins.

In addition, the cultivation of the god will consume a lot of resources, where can there be so many divine coins.

Ye Tian spent 500 divine coins to exchange for some resources that could assist him in cultivating the Xuanxuan Technique, and then checked a circle of talents in the Void Heaven Temple and copied all their talents.

It's a pity that Ye Tian didn't find a more awesome talent.

Obviously, even in the chaos, the talent is relatively rare.

Ye Tian could cultivate all the time in the Void Heaven Palace, but he still returned to the human race.

At the very least, the Terrans needed his protection, and could help him gather intelligence and some rare resources, but the Void Heaven Temple couldn't really give him resources.

The Great Universe has just been formed, and many high-level resources have been born, so it can be said that the entire Great Universe is full of chance treasures.

Ye Tian sent the members of the Heavenly Pavilion out to collect resources and information from all over the universe, while he himself began to merge the talents that had been copied from the disciples of the Void Heaven Hall and the Heavenly Monarch.

It didn't take long for all of Ye Tian's talents to be successfully fused.

At this point, his talent became like this-

Host: Ye Tian

Cultivation Talent: Advanced

Source Force Talent: Super God Level (Extreme)

Source Talent: Super God Level (Extreme)

Source Talent: Super God (Extreme)

Source Knife Talent: No superior

Source Sword Talent: No superior

Source space-time talent: Super god level

Source Fire Talent: God-level (Extreme)

Source Talent: God-level (Extreme)

Source Gold Talent: God-level (Extreme)

Genmu talent: God level

Source Water Talent: God-level (Extreme)

Source Immortal Talent: God-level

Yuan Hengguang talent: God level

Source Annihilation Talent: God-level

......

After several talents were upgraded to extreme talents, Ye Tian's strength improved a little, and he had a deeper understanding of the rules of gold, water, earth, and fire, and almost excavated the power of rules to an extremely high level.

Ye Tian originally wanted to raise his other talents to the limit level one by one, but he couldn't get close to those god generals and heavenly monarchs.

Those gods and heavenly monarchs have their own powers, and he can't go to other people's headquarters to copy his talents, it's easy to be caught.

Although the strength of the Void Heaven Temple is strong, it is not the strongest force, although some of the big forces in the chaos are not strong, but they are pouring out, sending the top god generals and heavenly monarchs among the forces.

And the Void Heaven One Pulse didn't pay too much attention to it, the top Heavenly Monarch and the Divine General were not sent, although Peng Yu Heavenly Monarch was powerful, but it was not ranked in the top ten among the Void Heaven One Pulse Heavenly Monarch, it can be seen that the top ten Heavenly Monarchs did not come in at all.

If the Void Heaven is pouring out, then he can definitely dominate the universe, then he can also be a fox and a tiger, but now he doesn't dare to do this, otherwise he will be looking for death.

"Wait for the opportunity!"

Ye Tian muttered.

In the next few days, while Ye Tian was cultivating, he went to the Void Heaven Hall to take a stroll.

Although the Void Heaven Temple did not have any resources to provide him, some of the classics were free to consult, which was provided free of charge by those Heavenly Monarchs of the Void Heaven Palace.

For the other disciples of the Void Heaven Palace, those free classics were of little use, but Ye Tian's knowledge was very lacking, so he attached great importance to these classics and browsed them very carefully.

Gradually, Ye Tian learned more and more about chaotic knowledge, and his own background naturally became stronger and stronger.

Decades later.

Ye Tian finally realized the true usefulness of the extreme talent, and the extreme talent had something to do with supernatural powers.

Divine powers are divided into entry, small success, great success and consummation, but there is another level above consummation, that is, the limit!

If you cultivate a supernatural power to the limit, it is an extreme supernatural power!

The power of the Extreme Divine Power far exceeds the Perfection Divine Power, and if you control an Extreme Divine Power, the combat power is very terrifying.

For example, Peng Yu Tianjun has mastered an extreme supernatural power, and his strength is extremely terrifying.

"I didn't expect that the extreme talent can make people cultivate into extreme supernatural powers, so if I say so, I hope to practice a bunch of extreme supernatural powers in the future?"

Ye Tian said darkly.

However, this step is still too far away for him.

this day.

A piece of news came that the Yuan Gu God would step into the realm of Heavenly Destiny.

After stepping into the realm of Heavenly Destiny, the strength of the Yuan Gu God General skyrocketed, and he entered retreat, and it took him a long time to transform his body into a chaotic life.

However, what he condensed was only the most ordinary chaotic life, and his future potential was limited, and it was possible that he would be in the early stage of the Heavenly Destiny Realm for the rest of his life.

But he can't help it, the ancient god general has no backer, and his strength is too weak, just the strength of a one-star god general can bully him.

This time, hundreds of thousands of divine generals poured into the chaos, all of them were extremely powerful divine generals, and his pressure could be imagined how huge it was.

Therefore, he had to be promoted to the Heavenly Mandate realm and become a Heavenly Monarch.

After some more time, the Yuangu Heavenly Monarch announced that he had led many Earth Lords of the Yuangu Holy Land to join the Qilin Palace.

The Qilin Hall is under the command of Allah Qilin, and the ancient god general once entered the inheritance place of the Qilin Hall, and has some fate with the Qilin Hall, although he is not qualified to become a named disciple of Allah Qilin, but because of this fate, he was able to close the thigh of the Qilin Hall.

Although the Qilin Hall is not strong, there are also True Ancestors behind it, and there are also several powerful Heavenly Monarchs in charge, so the Ancient Heavenly Monarch is enough to live a stable life for the time being.

There are not many people like Yuangu Heavenly Monarch who have stepped into the Heavenly Mandate Realm early and no longer accumulate strength, and some Ten Star Earth Venerables feel that their potential is not enough, and they have no hope of stepping into the Divine General, so they begin to impact the Heavenly Mandate Realm.

Someone fails, someone succeeds.

But in general, the people who fail account for ninety percent, because the realm of the Mandate of Heaven is not so easy to step into, once it fails, although it will not die, but the strength is greatly damaged, the foundation is broken, and there is no hope for the Mandate of Heaven in the future.

Even in the midst of chaos, many Earth Venerable cultivators did not dare to rashly attack the Heavenly Mandate Realm in order to reach the extreme.

Moreover, it is more difficult to impact the Heavenly Mandate Realm in chaos, and the Great Universe is relatively easy, this is a situation caused by the rules, otherwise the Great Universe will not become a real treasure of chance.

If these earth deities of the universe are allowed to go to chaos, it is estimated that 1,000 people and 999 people will break through and fail.

The human race does not have a powerhouse in the Mandate of Heaven realm, because Ye Tian forbade the Earth Venerables to rashly attack the Mandate of Heaven, unless it is really impossible to make any progress, they are allowed to impact the Mandate of Heaven.

After all, the human race has a backer behind it, the Void Heaven Temple, so it naturally doesn't care about the threat of other forces.
